description_long: This is a compact coupe car with a striking custom paint job featuring a vivid red roof and hood, contrasted by black lower body panels adorned with intricate skull and abstract patterns. The car has a modern, sporty silhouette with two doors, a short rear overhang, and a slightly rounded roofline. The front fascia includes a small grille, circular headlights, and a prominent skull graphic on the hood. The side profile reveals silver alloy wheels, blacked-out pillars, and large side mirrors. The rear view shows dual exhaust pipes and a minimalist taillight design. The windows are tinted, and the overall appearance suggests a blend of urban style and youthful energy.
description: A compact, two-door coupe car with a red roof and hood, black body panels, and bold skull-themed graphics. It features silver alloy wheels, tinted windows, and a sporty, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red roof, black body with skull graphics, two doors, and silver alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the red hood with a skull graphic, circular headlights, and compact grille.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the red roof, black body, and graphic details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the red roof, black rear panel, dual exhaust pipes, and minimalist taillights.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
